reports.title: Blood Test Analysis
reports.summary: The blood test shows a healthy hematological profile, with a mild rise in cholesterol that can be managed with diet and follow-up testing.
findings: Cholesterol is mildly elevated and should be monitored.
Blood glucose is stable for the current profile.

reports.rawText: Total cholesterol: 240 mg/dL (High). Hemoglobin: 14.1 g/dL (Normal). Glucose: 92 mg/dL (Normal).

reports.title: CBC Analysis
reports.summary: CBC metrics appear balanced. There are no urgent abnormalities in the complete blood count.
findings: White blood cell count is normal.
Red blood cell count is healthy.
Platelet count is within expected range.
reports.rawText: WBC: 6.5 x10^3/uL. RBC: 4.8 x10^6/uL. Platelets: 250 x10^3/uL.
